  • Uses of FusekiServer in org.apache.jena.fuseki.main

    Methods in org.apache.jena.fuseki.main that return FusekiServer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static FusekiServer
    FusekiMain.build(String... args)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Use FusekiMain.construct(String...)
    FusekiServer
    FusekiServer.Builder.build()
    Build a server according to the current description.
    static FusekiServer
    FusekiMain.construct(String... args)
    Build, but do not start, a server based on command line syntax.
    static FusekiServer
    FusekiMain.construct(FusekiModules fusekiModules, String... args)
    Build, but do not start, a server based on modules and the command line syntax.
    static FusekiServer
    FusekiServer.construct(String... args)
    Deprecated.
    Use FusekiMain.construct(java.lang.String...) or FusekiRunner.basic()
    static FusekiServer
    FusekiServer.get(jakarta.servlet.ServletContext cxt)
    Return the FusekiServer associated with a ServletContext.
    static FusekiServer
    FusekiServer.make(int port, String name, org.apache.jena.sparql.core.DatasetGraph dsg)
    Construct a Fuseki server for one dataset.
    static FusekiServer
    FusekiMain.run(String... args)
    Run a server asynchronously based on the command line arguments.
    static FusekiServer
    FusekiServer.run(int port, String name, org.apache.jena.sparql.core.DatasetGraph dsg)
    Run a Fuseki server for one dataset.
    static FusekiServer
    FusekiServer.run(String... args)
    Deprecated.
    Use FusekiMain.run(java.lang.String...) or FusekiRunner.basic()
    FusekiServer
    FusekiServer.Builder.start()
    Shortcut: build, then start the server.
    FusekiServer
    FusekiServer.start()
    Start the server - the server continues to run after this call returns.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    FusekiLib.names(FusekiServer server)
    Return a collection of the names registered.
    static void
    FusekiLib.reload(FusekiServer server, org.apache.jena.rdf.model.Model configuration)
    Process a configuration mode to find the DataServices and reset the server DataAccessPointRegistry.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FusekiServer
    Runner.construct(String... args)
    Setup a FusekiServer from the command line options.
    FusekiServer
    Runner.runAsync(String... args)
    Setup a FusekiServer from the command line options and run it asynchronously.
    static FusekiServer
    FusekiRunner.runAsyncBasic(String... args)
    Minimal server - e.g. embedded use and testing
    static FusekiServer
    FusekiRunner.runAsyncMain(String... args)
    Basic server
    static FusekiServer
    FusekiRunner.runAsyncServerPlain(String... args)
    All available server functionality, except admin functionality; no UI
    static FusekiServer
    FusekiRunner.runAsyncServerUI(String... args)
    General server, with UI

    The outcome of the "build" step.
    default void
    FusekiAutoModule.serverAfterStarting(FusekiServer server)
    Server started - called just after server.start happens, and before server .start() returns to the application.

    Server started - called just after server.start happens, and before server .start() returns to the application.

    Called just after server.start() called.

    Server started - called just after server.start happens, and before server .start() returns to the application.
